title: Podman v3 miss all registries except listed in short names
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

Podman at least version 3 from testing repo comes without `/etc/containers/registries.conf`. As a result it doesn't know anythin about any registry and images except listed in `/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/shortnames.conf`

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

```
podman pull ubuntu
Error: error getting default registries to try: short-name "ubuntu" did not resolve to an alias and no unqualified-search registries are defined in ""
```

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version 3.0.0-rc1
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```

```

ii  podman-plugins                       1.1.1~1

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide?**

Yes

comments.body: Which testing repository are you referring to?

@mheon `https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/testing/xUbuntu_${VERSION_ID}` from [the install manual](https://podman.io/getting-started/installation)
```
. /etc/os-release
echo "deb https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/testing/xUbuntu_${VERSION_ID}/ /" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/devel:kubic:libcontainers:testing.list
curl -L https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/testing/xUbuntu_${VERSION_ID}/Release.key | sudo apt-key add -
sudo apt-get update -qq
sudo apt-get -qq -y install podman
```

Stable version (v2) come with `/etc/containers/registries.conf` that contain docker.io and quay.io.
Test packages, however, miss it.

So this looks like a packaging issue, like #9257
Should be fixed in the current kubic testing. Please reopen if issue persists.

@lsm5 just checking (because I'm unfamiliar with the terminology) -- should I expect this to be fixed in 3.0.0 or do I wait for a future release for this

Are there any workarounds for this?

This seems to still be an issue in the current stable/testing (which at this moment, show the same version numbers)

```
$ apt-cache madison podman containers-common 
    podman | 100:3.0.0-1 | http://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/testing/xUbuntu_18.04  Packages
containers-common |    100:1-7 | http://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/testing/xUbuntu_18.04  Packages

$ ls /etc/containers/*
/etc/containers/containers.conf  /etc/containers/policy.json  /etc/containers/storage.conf

/etc/containers/registries.conf.d:
shortnames.conf

/etc/containers/registries.d:
default.yaml

$ cat /etc/containers/policy.json 
{
    "default": [
        {
            "type": "insecureAcceptAnything"
        }
    ],
    "transports":
        {
            "docker-daemon":
                {
                    "": [{"type":"insecureAcceptAnything"}]
                }
        }
}

$ podman pull ubuntu
Error: error getting default registries to try: short-name "ubuntu" did not resolve to an alias and no unqualified-search registries are defined in ""

$ echo -e "[registries.search]\nregistries = ['docker.io']" | sudo tee /etc/containers/registries.conf
[registries.search]
registries = ['docker.io']

$ podman pull ubuntu
Resolving "ubuntu" using unqualified-search registries (/etc/containers/registries.conf)
Trying to pull docker.io/library/ubuntu:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob f611acd52c6c done  
Copying blob db98fc6f11f0 done  
Copying blob 83ee3a23efb7 done  
Copying config f63181f19b done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
f63181f19b2fe819156dcb068b3b5bc036820bec7014c5f77277cfa341d4cb5e
```
